summary: Comprehensive testing of Alfa Global Group website enhancements completed. All 15 features tested successfully - Newsletter subscription, WhatsApp chat button, Back to Top button, Cookie consent banner, Client testimonials, Partners/certifications section, Privacy and Terms pages, Theme switcher, and navigation all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All new components properly integrated with theme system
Newsletter API correctly validates email and handles duplicates
Cookie consent stores preference in localStorage as expected
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
FloatingWidgets component properly positioned with correct z-index
seed_data_creation: Newsletter test subscriptions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested and working. Newsletter API at POST /api/newsletter. FloatingWidgets includes WhatsApp, Back to Top, Cookie Consent, Scroll Progress. Privacy at /privacy, Terms at /terms.

homepage_sections.hero_section: PASS - 'Beyond Capital. Building Futures.' with performance overview card
homepage_sections.service_highlights: PASS - 4 clickable cards (Wealth Management, Private Equity, Fintech Trading, Cyber Security)
homepage_sections.client_testimonials: PASS - 4 testimonials with star ratings (Rajesh Sharma, Priya Patel, Michael Chen, Anita Desai)
homepage_sections.partners_certifications: PASS - SEBI, IFSCA, ISO 27001, NSE, BSE, AMFI, NSDL, CDSL logos

floating_widgets.whatsapp_button: PASS - Green button at bottom right, links to wa.me/914422242929
floating_widgets.back_to_top: PASS - Appears on scroll >400px, scrolls to top on click
floating_widgets.cookie_consent: PASS - Banner appears on first visit, stores preference in localStorage
floating_widgets.scroll_progress: PASS - Progress bar at top of page

theme_switcher.options: PASS - Golden White, Silver White, Royal Purple, Teal Gold
theme_switcher.functionality: PASS - Theme changes apply to all components

navigation.service_card_links: PASS - Cards link to correct company pages

api_tests.newsletter_duplicate: PASS - Handles gracefully with 'already subscribed' message
